/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_cu_cp_app_unit.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_cu_cp_app_unit.dir/cu_cp_unit_config_cli11_schema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_cu_cp_app_unit.dir/cu_cp_config_translators.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_cu_cp_app_unit.dir/cu_cp_unit_config_validator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_cu_cp_app_unit.dir/cu_cp_unit_config_yaml_writer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_cu_cp_app_unit.a
